title: Filtering groups with HAVING
prompt_md: Find users who have **more than 1** booking. Return `user_id` and the count aliased as `bookings`. Filter the groups with `HAVING`.
starter_code: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*)::int AS bookings FROM bookings GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
hints: `WHERE` filters rows before grouping; `HAVING` filters groups after.
Use `HAVING COUNT(*) > 1` to keep only groups with more than one row.
reference_solution: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*)::int AS bookings FROM bookings GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
